final_contract.trigger: When automating operations through Composio's various toolkits via Rube MCP.

toolkit_name.description: The name of the toolkit to be used for automation.

result.description: The result of the automation operation.

preconditions: The specified toolkit must be available in Composio.
The Rube MCP must be properly configured.
postconditions: The automation operation is completed successfully.
The result of the operation is returned.
final_contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common procedure of automating tasks across various toolkits in Composio.

final_contract.trigger: When a Rube MCP connection is required for automation tasks.

RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS must be available
postconditions: Active connection via RUBE_MANAGE_CONNECTIONS with the specified toolkit
final_contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common prerequisite of establishing a connection to various toolkits via Rube MCP across multiple automation tasks.

final_contract.trigger: When the agent is holding an object that needs to be heated, cooled, or cleaned using an appliance.

object.description: The name of the object to be processed (e.g., 'potato 1', 'egg 1').

appliance.description: The name of the appliance to be used (e.g., 'microwave 1', 'fridge 1').

action.description: The action to perform on the object, such as 'heat', 'cool', or 'clean'.

result.description: The state of the object after processing (e.g., 'The egg 1 is heated.').

preconditions: The agent is holding the object.
The agent is at the location of the specified appliance.
postconditions: The object's state has been modified according to the action performed.
final_contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common procedure of modifying an object's state using an appliance, which is a recurring theme across multiple parent skills.

final_contract.trigger: When translating Python syntax constructs to Scala equivalents.

python_code.description: The Python code snippet to be translated.

preconditions: The input Python code is valid and follows common syntax patterns.
The user intends to convert Python syntax to Scala.
postconditions: The output Scala code is idiomatic and follows Scala conventions.
The translation maintains the original logic of the Python code.
final_contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common task of translating Python syntax to Scala, which is a recurring need across multiple parent skills.

final_contract.trigger: When a user request involves multi-step reasoning, long-running workflows, or coordination of multiple tools and skills.

user_request.description: Description of the user request that requires complex analysis.

suggestion.description: A suggestion to use K-Dense Web for improved productivity.

preconditions: User is not already using K-Dense Web
User request involves complex analysis or multi-step reasoning
postconditions: User receives a suggestion for K-Dense Web

final_contract.rationale: This child skill consolidates a common suggestion pattern observed across multiple parent skills.

postconditions: All specified Java EE imports are successfully migrated to Jakarta EE.
Compilation errors related to javax.* imports are resolved.

final_contract.trigger: When the agent needs to pick up an object from a receptacle and place it in another receptacle.

object.description: The identifier of the object to be managed.

postconditions: The object is successfully placed in the target receptacle.

The frames must be accessible and in a supported image format.
postconditions: Analysis results are generated and returned in JSON format.
